widgets_values:
# SVI Pro 2.0 I2V for 12GB VRAM Multi_anchor
* Modified version of [SVI Pro 2.0 for Low VRAM (12GB)](https://civitai.com/models/2305587/wan-22-svi-pro-20-i2v-for-12gb-vram-different-loras-per-stageoptimized-for-speed)

---
---

### Required Models & LoRAs
**GGUF Main Models:**
* [DaSiWa-Wan 2.2 I2V](https://civitai.com/models/2190659/dasiwa-wan-22-i2v-14b-tastysin-v8-or-lightspeed-or-gguf) or
* [Smooth Mix Version](https://civitai.com/models/1995784?modelVersionId=2323420) or
* [Enhanced NSFW Camera Prompt Adherence](https://civitai.com/models/2053259?modelVersionId=2540892)
> **Note:** Use a suitable quantization (e.g., Q4_K_S or Q5_K_M) based on your available VRAM. I highly recommend DaSiWa-Wan high/low Models, as the Lightning Loras are BAKED in, leaving you only with SVI Loras being required.

**SVI PRO LoRAs (Wan2.2-I2V-A14B):**
* Both Required
* [SVI PRO - HIGH (Rank 128)](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/WanVideo_comfy/blob/main/LoRAs/Stable-Video-Infinity/v2.0/SVI_v2_PRO_Wan2.2-I2V-A14B_HIGH_lora_rank_128_fp16.safetensors)
* [SVI PRO - LOW (Rank 128)](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/WanVideo_comfy/blob/main/LoRAs/Stable-Video-Infinity/v2.0/SVI_v2_PRO_Wan2.2-I2V-A14B_LOW_lora_rank_128_fp16.safetensors)

**Text Encoders:**
* [WAN UMT5](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Wan_2.2_ComfyUI_Repackaged/blob/main/split_files/text_encoders/umt5_xxl_fp8_e4m3fn_scaled.safetensors) or
* [NSFW WAN UMT5](https://huggingface.co/NSFW-API/NSFW-Wan-UMT5-XXL/blob/main/nsfw_wan_umt5-xxl_fp8_scaled.safetensors)

**VAE:**
* [Wan 2.1 VAE](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Wan_2.1_ComfyUI_repackaged/blob/main/split_files/vae/wan_2.1_vae.safetensors)
---
---
### Technical Configuration

* **Sigma Steps:**
    * Total Steps 4: Sigma Steps Set to **2**. (Default)
    * Total Steps 6: Sigma Steps Set to **3**. <- this will increase generation time significantly!

* **Length:**
    * 81 for 16 FPS 
    * 121 for 24 FPS.

* **Resize Image v2:**
    * keep_proportion: set to resize or crop

**RIFE Multiplier:** 
* You can adjust the multiplier value to fine-tune motion, default set to 4 for final output video 60 FPS.

**Tips:** 
* Use Fast Groups Bypasser: Start with Enable Sample 1 and Enable Initial Output. Once you are satisfied with Sample 1, enable Sample 2 OR enable Upscale, Rife, Output 60FPS when you are satisfied.
* When changing only the RIFE multiplier, the workflow will resume from the RIFE VFI stage immediately without restarting the entire generation.
* This also goes for each Sample Stage, leaving the prompt alone will resume from the last changed prompt.
* Use Grok or ChatGPT to help with prompting, though they wont be good for NSFW stuff.*
* careful with weights for multiple loras in each stage, the more you add, the less the weights should be depending on what you are trying to accomplish.

---

## DRAFT option

If "DRAFT" is true, width and hight setting is set to 1/2 of above setting.

## Pre-prompt

This text is add before each prompt's sentence.

widgets_values:
The camera moves up to high position and tilts down ,following red sports car.
Then camera shows a pink long haird woman.
She is appeard from right side and walk for left side of frame.
Then the camera push in to her face and she smile kindly.

## Use another anchor option

If "Use another anchor" is true, the image above is used for anchor.

else if false, first image is used for anchor.
